name: Frigia
description: The homeland of the frost elves, sealed away from the mortal world long ago by the Drune using the Ring of Chel — a ring of standing stones. Thinwhistle desires its barrier to be reopened.
notes: Sealed by the Drune with the Ring of Chel, a ring of standing stones. The barrier prevents entry — Thinwhistle himself cannot cross.
Thinwhistle suggested that where the waters of Naon fall from great heights, where the watchers wait, passage may be possible for mortals.
Thinwhistle's cryptic message spoke of a starving court that has dined on sugared lies for nine hundred years.
